task_description: Add monthly AI token limits per plan tier, create enforcement logic, build a super admin AI Token Settings page for managing per-tenant limits/usage, and integrate budget checking into the AI gateway.

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly (tsc --noEmit exits 0). All 448 tests pass across 39 test files including 13 new tests for checkAiTokenBudget and recordAiTokenUsage. Tests cover boundary conditions, override logic, unlimited plans, and the recording upsert pattern.
